title: Restore the Classics
description: Old grass sounds, old dirt sounds, old clouds, old dye texture, old chest and copper chest sounds, and removed end flashes.
body:
## What it does:
- Grass: Restores the old grass break sounds from 1.21.4, replacing the quiet version introduced in 1.21.5.
- Clouds: Restores the old clouds from 1.21.5, replacing the stretched version introduced in 1.21.6. (v2+)
- Dye: Restores the old dye texture from 1.21.8, replacing the shaped versions introduced in 1.21.9. (v3+)
- Chests: Restores the old chest sounds from 1.21.8, replacing the quiet version introduced in 1.21.9. (v3+)
- Copper Chests: Adds louder copper chest sounds to match normal chests (v3+)
- End Flashes: Removed end flashes (for this to fully work set "Hide Sky Flashes" to true under "Accessibility Settings" (v3+)
- Dirt: Restores the old dirt break sounds from 1.21.5, replacing the quiet version introduced in 1.21.6.(v3.1+)

This pack does not require optifine or sodium but it is compatible with them.

This pack has support for [respackopts](https://modrinth.com/mod/respackopts) past version 2.0.0

Check out my new resource pack: [No environmental fog / volumetric fog](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/no-environmental-fog-or-volumetric-fog) although its not compatable with sodium

Have an idea for me to add? [Click Here](https://github.com/cat67315/Old-grass-block-sounds/issues) and create an issue
